message:
feat(freeze): Add copy_data_properties opcode Zig support

Convert copy_data_properties opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode implements object spread syntax {...obj}.

Stack effect: [target, source, excludeList] -> (no change)

Implementation:
- Reads source and target from stack without popping
- Checks if source is not undefined/null
- Gets global Object and its assign method
- Calls Object.assign(target, source)
- Ignores excludeList for simplicity
- Frees temporary values (global, Object, assign, result)
- Returns exception if assign call fails
- In Zig: uses array literal syntax for args
- In C: uses array initializer syntax
